parts.name: Container
parts.description: the interactive surface — receives focus, hover, press states

parts.name: Label
parts.description: action verb in title case; the primary affordance signal

parts.name: Leading icon (optional)
parts.description: reinforces the label; decorative when paired with text

parts.name: Trailing icon (optional)
parts.description: chevron or external-link glyph for navigation hints

parts.name: Loading indicator (optional)
parts.description: replaces label when action is in-flight

patternRefs.note: hover/focus/active transitions stay within the 100-200ms band

requirementRefs.note: must be operable with Enter and Space (button) or Enter (link)
loading + disabled states must be announced; do not rely on color alone

_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the MD source; CI regenerates this file.

parts.name: Container
parts.description: the bounding surface — frames the data presentation

parts.name: Title or heading (optional)
parts.description: identifies what the data represents

parts.name: Primary content
parts.description: the data itself — text, value, chart, table cells, badge label

parts.name: Supporting metadata (optional)
parts.description: timestamps, units, counts, attribution

parts.name: Visual indicator (optional)
parts.description: color dot, icon, badge, or status pill

parts.name: Action affordance (optional)
parts.description: expand, drill-in, dismiss, or copy

patternRefs.note: rows/cards reveal with skeleton placeholders during load
lists, tables, search-result-cards enter with staggered fades
collapsible cards/sections expand at the accordion pace

requirementRefs.note: status colors must have a non-color cue (icon, label, pattern)
tables and graphs must reflow or scroll horizontally; never clip
tables use thead/tbody/scope; charts expose data tables for screen readers

_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the MD source; CI regenerates this file.

parts.name: Container
parts.description: the bounding surface — typically a status region or live region

parts.name: Status icon
parts.description: glyph + color reinforcing severity (info, success, warning, error)

parts.name: Title (optional)
parts.description: short headline summarizing the message

parts.name: Message
parts.description: the body content explaining what happened and (if applicable) what to do

parts.name: Action (optional)
parts.description: primary action — retry, undo, dismiss, view details

parts.name: Dismiss control (optional)
parts.description: explicit close affordance for transient feedback

patternRefs.note: transient feedback follows the toast enter/exit timing curve
loader-with-logo + loading-skeleton inherit the skeleton pulse cadence
severity transitions (e.g. error → success) cross-fade rather than swap

requirementRefs.note: error severity must be conveyed by text + icon, not color alone
transient messages use role=status (polite) or role=alert (assertive) per severity
respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable entrance pulse + slide
focus must not be stolen by toasts; persistent alerts may receive focus when actionable

_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the MD source; CI regenerates this file.

parts.name: Label
parts.description: caller-supplied text bound to the control via for/aria-labelledby

parts.name: Required indicator
parts.description: visible asterisk; aria-required carries the semantics

parts.name: Control
parts.description: the input/select/checkbox/radio/toggle element

parts.name: Helper text
parts.description: optional persistent guidance below the control

parts.name: Validation message
parts.description: error/warning/success; replaces helper text when active

parts.name: Leading icon (optional)
parts.description: decorative or semantic hint inside the control

parts.name: Trailing icon (optional)
parts.description: often interactive — clear, reveal, dropdown caret

patternRefs.note: focus-ring fade-in on focus; opacity transition on disabled

requirementRefs.note: every control needs a programmatically-associated label + accessible error message

_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the MD source; CI regenerates this file.

parts.name: Container
parts.description: the navigation region — typically a landmark role (nav/banner)

parts.name: Items
parts.description: individual navigable entries; one is marked "current" when applicable

parts.name: Item label
parts.description: short, scannable text; never sentence case

parts.name: Item icon (optional)
parts.description: reinforces meaning at a glance; not a substitute for label

parts.name: Active indicator
parts.description: visual treatment for the current item — underline, bar, fill, or background

parts.name: Trigger (optional)
parts.description: opens a dropdown/menu for grouped or contextual items

patternRefs.note: hover/focus transitions on items stay subtle — no large translation
dropdown triggers (account-dropdown, notification-dropdown, etc.) anchor to their button

requirementRefs.note: arrow-key traversal between items; Tab moves to/from the navigation region
use aria-current=page on the active item; nav landmark on the container

_meta.do_not_edit: Edit the MD source; CI regenerates this file.

parts.name: Trigger
parts.description: the element that opens the overlay; retains focus return on close

parts.name: Surface
parts.description: the overlay panel itself — modal dialog, drawer, popover, tooltip

parts.name: Scrim (optional)
parts.description: dimmed backdrop used for modals + drawers; absent for popovers/tooltips

parts.name: Header (optional)
parts.description: title + close affordance for dismissible overlays

parts.name: Body
parts.description: the overlay's primary content

parts.name: Footer (optional)
parts.description: action affordances — confirm/cancel/close

parts.name: Arrow or pointer (optional)
parts.description: anchors popovers/tooltips to their trigger

patternRefs.note: drawer-side-panel slides on axis with easing per the drawer pattern
popover/tooltip anchor open at the trigger with origin transform

requirementRefs.note: focus moves into the overlay on open, trapped while modal-blocking, returns to trigger on close; Escape closes dismissible overlays, outside-click closes popovers but not modals
dialogs use role=dialog + aria-modal=true + labelled by header; tooltips use role=tooltip + aria-describedby
respect prefers-reduced-motion — disable scale + slide, keep fade
